boundary_binding.action_boundary: May procurement release the near-threshold renewal?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Cannot ALLOW. The source records (DEL-WRE-077, REN-WRE-077) show the renewal amount (USD 50750) exceeds the delegation ceiling (USD 50000). This violates STD-WRE-077-P's requirement for amount-ceiling alignment before release.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: DEL-WRE-077 authorizes renewal up to USD 50000; REN-WRE-077 shows renewal for USD 50750, exceeding the ceiling.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: ESCALATE required. The renewal amount USD 50750 exceeds the delegation ceiling USD 50000 per DEL-WRE-077. WARN-WRE-077 confirms the near-threshold sensitivity. Source boundary remains open per STD-WRE-077-P requirements.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Delegation DEL-WRE-077 ceiling (USD 50000) is authority for this renewal. Renewal amount USD 50750 falls outside this authority scope. Timing (2026-06-27 signed before action 2026-06-28) is satisfied, but scope dependency fails due to amount misalignment.

critical_features_preserved: Gov chooses control actions, not models.
final_answer: ESCALATE. The renewal amount of USD 50750 (REN-WRE-077) exceeds the delegation ceiling of USD 50000 (DEL-WRE-077). This violates the amount-alignment requirement in STD-WRE-077-P, which mandates that delegation authority must match the renewal amount before release. The committee warning (WARN-WRE-077) correctly flags this near-threshold situation. Source boundary remains open; Gov must authorize or reject this renewal.
open_blockers: Renewal amount (USD 50750) exceeds delegation ceiling (USD 50000) — source boundary open.
Std-WRE-077-P requires amount alignment before release; this condition is unmet.
Gov authority required to authorize amount exceeding delegation.
